mapper.insert: insert into student(name, no, gender, phone, id_card, is_college, address, degree, graduation_date, clazz_id, violation_count, violation_score, create_time, update_time) values (#{name}, #{no}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{idCard}, #{isCollege}, #{address}, #{degree}, #{graduationDate}, #{clazzId}, #{violationCount}, #{violationScore}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.delete:
delete from student where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select s.*, c.name clazz_name from student s left join clazz c on s.clazz_id = c.id where s.id = #{id}

select (case degree when 1 then '初中' when 2 then '高中' when 3 then '大专' when 4 then '本科' when 5 then '硕士' when 6 then '博士' else '其他' end) name, count(*) value from student group by degree order by value desc
select c.name name, count(s.id) value from clazz c left join student s on s.clazz_id = c.id group by c.id, c.name order by value desc
select count(*) from student where clazz_id = #{clazzId}
